title: Brs Iron Ore And Steel Bi Weekly Newsletter
section_path: Brs Iron Ore And Steel Bi Weekly Newsletter
section_path_text: Brs Iron Ore And Steel Bi Weekly Newsletter
summary:
Main
In April, crude steel production in the 63 countries reporting to the World Steel Association declined to 161.4 million tons, representing a decrease of 2.4% compared to the corresponding period last year. During the first four months of the year, Japan and South Korea combined produced 51.2 million tons, experiencing a slight decrease of 1.7 million tons compared to the same period last year. In contrast, India's steel production maintains firm, with an annual growth of 3%.
